title: Allow loading and saving ExternalTools to Database

it would be nice to be able to store and share the external tools info in the same database as config. yes I know that a lot is dependent on the location of the external tools, and there probably need be a way to check for each tool and disable if they ...

iterations.description: Feature request to persist ExternalTools configuration in SQL Server database alongside connection data, currently only saved to local XML/confCons files

notes:
AI triage: Feature request to persist ExternalTools configuration in SQL Server database alongside connection data, currently only saved to local XML/confCons files
Approach: Extend the SQL database schema and serializer/deserializer to include ExternalTools table, add save/load logic for external tools when using database storage mode
